description: Perform a geoprocessing workflow in gvSIG Desktop to create a riparian zones land-use map. Using the loaded 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' layer and the rivers layer (/home/ga/gvsig_data/rivers/ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines.shp), create a 1-degree river buffer saved to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/river_buffers.shp and a final union of countries and buffers saved to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/countries_rivers_union.shp.
